details: Quote verbatim in paper; DOI 10.3390/ph19020256 present; compound 20 N-(Cyclohexylamino)methylenebisphosphonic acid with mp 214-215 °C confirmed; value_celsius=214.5 = midpoint of 214-215 range.

Quote and value are verbatim in paper and the dioxime compound 7a mp 138 °C is correct, but compound_name field has elemental-analysis prefix 'C, 77.27; H, 5.49; N, 5.11.' prepended to the actual chemical name, making the compound_name field malformed.
Quote 'Compound 4a-I (0.57 g, 56%, mp 218 °C)' present; DOI 10.1021/acsomega.5c11955 present; compound code 4a-I (dispiro trans pyrazole-cyclotriphosphazene hybrid) identified.

Long quote substring present (ends at 'm.p. 82°C (dec' which matches paper's 'm.p. 82°C (decomp.)'); compound 1 = 2-(bromomethyl)benzothiazole; decomposition at 82 °C; compound_name has leading 'Synthesis of' prefix but compound is identifiable.

Quote present and value 256°C verbatim, but the quote header lists compounds 23 and 24 ('3-(Benzocumarin-3'-yl)-pyrazole' and its 1-phenyl analog); mp 256°C in the quote belongs to 'Compound 25' (a different compound), not compound 23 which has mp 235°C; compound_name '3-(Benzocumarin-3'-yl)-pyrazole' is compound 23, but the value 256°C belongs to compound 25 — there is a label/value mismatch.
